title: THSTI Senior Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
organization: Translational Health Science and Technology Institute (THSTI)
short_info: Translational Health Science and Technology Institute (THSTI) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Senior Manager Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for research jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit for Senior Manager: 50 years. Age Relaxation: PwBD (UR): 10 years Government servants: 5 years (with 3 years continuous service) Ex-servicemen (ESM): 5 years (with 5 years military service) THSTI and Departmental candidates: Up to 5 years for existing employees of THSTI and employees of the Department of Biotechnology. Not applicable to employees of THSTI and DBT who completed 5 years of service as on 20th February 2020.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate/PG Degree in HR/Finance or equivalent/CA/ICWA with 15 years of supervisory post-qualification experience.
qualification.details: Senior Manager: Graduate/PG Degree in HR/Finance or equivalent/CA/ICWA with fifteen (15) years of supervisory post-qualification experience in Central Government/autonomous body/university.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the THSTI Senior Manager Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of THSTI to complete the application.
